# SESSION HANDOFF — V2.3 BQ-audit, gates, capacity & scale strategy ([REDACTED]13)

> Đọc file này + các memory file liệt kê ở §7 là có đủ context để tiếp tục. Mọi kết quả đều
> BQ-auditable (T+1 Open, dữ liệu `tav2_bq.*`, self-check 0 VND). Quy ước: **chạy simulation =
> mặc định kèm audit**; **DT5G là state mặc định** mọi chiến lược.

---

## 1. TL;DR — đang ở đâu
- Đã re-audit toàn bộ family V2.3 + V11 + V12.1 từ 2014→nay trên harness BQ-thuần (T+1 Open, KHÔNG intraday, KHÔNG panel curated). Phơi bày: số công bố cũ (26.3%) lạc quan; auditable thật ~21-22%.
- Qua nhiều vòng (driven bởi user), chốt **bản deploy = V2.3A + postbull-gate + edge-conditional-allocator + strict-ETF-cap**, đã WIRE vào production `pt_v22_dt5g.py`.
- Định lượng **trần công suất ~200B** (alpha erode vì tiền nhàn không deploy được, KHÔNG phải hết mã).
- **TASK ĐANG DỞ (user vừa duyệt, bị interrupt trước khi chạy):** backtest **rổ VN30-custom-ex-VIC** thay E1VFVN30 trong parking (creation-capacity) ở NAV 200B/500B — xem gỡ được bao nhiêu alpha-mất. Xem §5.

## 2. Bản deploy (đã wire vào production pt_v22_dt5g.py)
3 thành phần thêm lượt này (changelog ở docstring pt_v22_dt5g.py):
1. **postbull gate** (`postbull_block`): hard-block CAPIT washout nếu (VNINDEX trailing-2yr ret ≥60%) AND (dd-từ-đỉnh-1y > −15%). = "đừng bắt dao hậu-bull-mạnh chưa điều chỉnh". Generalize 2007/2018/2022.
2. **edge-conditional allocator** (`w_lag_target`): tilt LAG→0.65 ở NEUTRAL/BULL/EXBULL CHỈ khi LAG edge-health `mean12` (data/lag_edge_health.csv, trailing-12M LAG post-ret) ≥ 4%; else 0.50. BEAR=0/CRISIS=0.50.
3. **strict ETF cap** (`ETF_LIQ_KW`): E1VFVN30 parking cap 20% × ADV-thứ-cấp-60d/ngày, fill nhiều ngày.

**Số bản deploy (FULL 2014→now, BQ-auditable):**
| config | CAGR | Sharpe | MaxDD | Calmar | file data/ |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V2.3A+postbull+edge (creation/uncapped ETF) | 24.64 | 1.82 | −20.3 | 1.22 | v23_golive_audit_2014_now_matpostbull_shrink0_edge[_etfliqcreation].csv |
| **V2.3A+postbull+edge+STRICT ETF (PRODUCTION)** | **23.68** | **1.96** | **−17.2** | **1.37** | v23_..._edge_etfliqstrict.csv |
| V2.3C+postbull (no allocator, min-DD alt) | 23.35 | 1.72 | −19.0 | 1.23 | v23c_..._matpostbull_shrink0.csv |
| V2.2-base (no CAPIT, robust floor) | 21.23 | 1.58 | −18.5 | 1.14 | v22base_audit_2014_now.csv |
VNINDEX B&H 10.7%/0.65/−45.3. Bracket số thật theo ETF-liquidity: **strict 23.68 ↔ creation 24.64** (creation = dùng primary-creation, khả thi quy mô tổ chức).

**Window thực tế 2025-06-09→nay (strict):** +10.68% vs VNINDEX +36.4% — TỤT vì sóng VIC-led narrow (điểm yếu cấu hữu, không phải bug). File `..._edge_etfliqstrict_from20250609.csv`.

## 3. Audit infrastructure — chạy & verify
**Engine**: `simulate_holistic_nav.py` (KHÔNG sửa logic core; chỉ THÊM param tùy chọn `etf_adv_lookup`/`etf_liquidity_pct` default off; cột carry cho lãi-vay-cash-âm).
**Harness chính**: `pt_v23_audit_2014.py` — args + env:
```
python pt_v23_audit_2014.py <MODE> <cap> <maturity> <ew2d_shrink> <edge>
  MODE: v23a (allocator+CAPIT) | v23c (static 50/50+CAPIT) | v22base (no CAPIT)
  cap: none | 0.15 ...  (per-event CAPIT cap)
  maturity: off | smooth | gate15 | ew2d | postbull
  ew2d_shrink (argv4): 0.0 = hard-block; default 0.30
  edge (argv5): "edge" = edge-conditional allocator
  ENV: AUDIT_START=YYYY-MM-DD (windowed) | NAV_TOTAL_B=200 (capacity) | ETF_LIQ=off|strict|creation
DEPLOY run: python pt_v23_audit_2014.py v23a none postbull 0.0 edge   (+ ETF_LIQ=strict)
```
**Verifier (đóng vai bot ngoài)**: `data/v23_audit_spotcheck.py N <file>` (allocator files) hoặc `data/audit_spotcheck_generic.py N <file>` (V11/V12.1, đọc nhãn sổ từ META). Kiểm: giá vs BQ 0 mismatch, cash-flow identity 0 VND, allocator-replay (qua cột w_lag_tgt) 0 VND, metric dựng-lại khớp.
**Emitter dùng chung**: `audit_lib.py` (N-sổ; combined_override cho ensemble; cột cash_carry).
**Scripts khác**: `pt_v11_audit_2014.py`, `pt_v121_audit_2014.py`, `pt_lagvn30_audit_2014.py` (argv full/vn30).
**Output 1-file**: record_type META(quy trình verify)/TX/DAILY/METRIC/EVENT_CAPIT/REBAL/ANNUAL.

## 4. Tally tất cả bản đã audit (FULL 2014→now, BQ-thuần T+1 Open) — xem [[audited_versions_tally_2026]]
V2.3 family 21-24% > V11 (momentum-only) 19.80 > V12.1 (ensemble switch) 16.85. One-wallet LAGGED+VN30/full-BAL (17-18%) THUA two-book silo (silo = feature). CAPIT-gate journey: uncapped risk-neg → ew2d → postbull-hardblock thắng base mọi trục.

## 5. ✅ DONE ([REDACTED]14) — backtest rổ VN30-custom-ex-VIC parking ở NAV lớn
> **KẾT QUẢ** (BQ-auditable, spotcheck 0 VND mọi NAV — chi tiết [[capacity-ceiling-custom-vn30-2026]]):
> custom ex-VIC basket (creation-cap ~418B/day) gỡ alpha-mất rõ ở NAV lớn. Bảng CAGR 3 vehicle × 4 NAV:
> 500B: strict 13.11 → creation(VN30 thật) 16.58 → **custom 21.22%** (Sh1.49/DD−18.0/Cal1.18).
> Decompose: **cap-thuần (creation−strict) = +0.7→+3.5pp** (deployable-honest, beta VN30 thật, no hindsight);
> exVIC-leg (custom−creation) = +2.3→+4.6pp NHƯNG ~½ là survivorship-beta của rổ (custom@50 thắng cả khi
> chưa nghẽn). Production rule §8.3 (>200B → VN30 custom) VALIDATED, nhưng quảng cáo số honest = cap-leg +
> beta-thật-của-rổ-PIT, đừng claim nguyên +8.1pp. Files: custom_basket.py, ETF_LIQ=custom, basket_capacity_compare.py.

### (lịch sử) đề bài gốc — backtest rổ VN30-custom-ex-VIC parking ở NAV lớn
**Mục tiêu**: ở 200B/500B, deploy config mất alpha vì tiền-nhàn-phình (58-65% NAV) chỉ park được ít vào E1VFVN30 (strict cap ~2-4B/day). Thay E1VFVN30 bằng **rổ VN30-custom (ex-VIC, có thể quality-tilt 8L)** có **creation-capacity** (~2320B/day = ~100x ETF) → xem gỡ được bao nhiêu CAGR ở 200-500B.
**Cách làm đề xuất**:
1. Tạo chuỗi giá tổng hợp "custom-basket" = return rổ VN30-ex-VIC (cap-weight hoặc quality-tilt) hàng ngày từ tav2_bq.ticker. Dùng nó thay `vn30_underlying` (vehicle parking).
2. ETF ADV cap = 20% × tổng trading-value rổ (creation-capacity), truyền qua `etf_adv_lookup`/`etf_liquidity_pct` (= mode "creation" nhưng vehicle là rổ custom thay ETF).
3. Chạy ở NAV_TOTAL_B=50/100/200/500, so vs strict-E1VFVN30 (bảng §6) → đo alpha gỡ lại.
**Kỳ vọng**: ở 200-500B, custom-basket-creation sẽ kéo CAGR lên gần mức 50B (vì tiền nhàn có chỗ deploy công-suất-lớn), nhưng là BETA có-kiểm-soát (ex-VIC). Lưu ý: cần kiểm rổ-ex-VIC có làm xấu/đẹp beta so VN30 đầy đủ không (2025 VIC kéo index → ex-VIC sẽ bắt ít sóng VIC hơn — đó là CHỦ ĐÍCH, đổi lấy justify-được).
**Caveat**: đây là execution-evolution, không đổi signal. Backtest-tương-đương mode "creation".

## 6. Bảng trần công suất (deploy config, strict ETF, full-history) — xem [[capacity-ceiling-custom-vn30-2026]]
| NAV | CAGR | Sharpe | DD | Calmar | cổ phiếu% | tiền-nhàn% | ETF% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 50B | 23.68 | 1.96 | −17.2 | 1.37 | 35 | 46 | 12 |
| 100B | 20.17 | 1.78 | −15.2 | 1.33 | 35 | 51 | 9 |
| 200B | 17.86 | 1.69 | −14.4 | 1.24 | 34 | 58 | 6 |
| 500B | 13.11 | 1.35 | −15.7 | 0.83 | 35 | 65 | 3 |
Cơ chế: cổ-phiếu% đứng ~35% mọi NAV → nút thắt = ETF parking không hấp thụ tiền nhàn (tiền-nhàn phình 46→65%). Ngưỡng ~200B (mất ¼ alpha). → đó là lý do cần rổ custom (§5).

## 7. Memory files đã ghi lượt này (load tự động qua MEMORY.md)
- `audited_versions_tally_2026.md` — bảng tổng mọi bản + ETF-cap + postbull + edge-alloc.
- `v23_audit_2014_now_deliverable.md` — chi tiết hành trình CAPIT gate (cap/maturity/ew2d/postbull/hard-block), cơ chế DD, walk-forward.
- `capacity_ceiling_custom_vn30_2026.md` — trần ~200B + thiết kế rổ custom.
- `simulation_[REDACTED]_audit_default.md` — quy ước audit + DT5G default.
- `capit_selection_study_2026.md` — chọn-mã CAPIT (chỉ golden PB_z robust).

## 8. Quy ước cố định (standing)
1. Chạy simulation/backtest → MẶC ĐỊNH kèm audit (1-file BQ-verifiable + spot-check; không báo "xong" nếu chưa pass).
2. DT5G (`tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`) = state mặc định mọi chiến lược mới.
3. Production parking = strict ETF cap; >200B chuyển dần sang rổ VN30 custom.
4. Bài học xuyên suốt: panel curated/intraday/uncapped-ETF đều thổi phồng; chỉ delta cùng-harness + walk-forward + economic-prior (không tối-ưu-IS) đáng tin.

# SESSION HANDOFF — V2.3 BQ-audit, gates, capacity & scale strategy ([REDACTED]13)

> Đọc file này + các memory file liệt kê ở §7 là có đủ context để tiếp tục. Mọi kết quả đều
> BQ-auditable (T+1 Open, dữ liệu `tav2_bq.*`, self-check 0 VND). Quy ước: **chạy simulation =
> mặc định kèm audit**; **DT5G là state mặc định** mọi chiến lược.

---

## 1. TL;DR — đang ở đâu
- Đã re-audit toàn bộ family V2.3 + V11 + V12.1 từ 2014→nay trên harness BQ-thuần (T+1 Open, KHÔNG intraday, KHÔNG panel curated). Phơi bày: số công bố cũ (26.3%) lạc quan; auditable thật ~21-22%.
- Qua nhiều vòng (driven bởi user), chốt **bản deploy = V2.3A + postbull-gate + edge-conditional-allocator + strict-ETF-cap**, đã WIRE vào production `pt_v22_dt5g.py`.
- Định lượng **trần công suất ~200B** (alpha erode vì tiền nhàn không deploy được, KHÔNG phải hết mã).
- **TASK ĐANG DỞ (user vừa duyệt, bị interrupt trước khi chạy):** backtest **rổ VN30-custom-ex-VIC** thay E1VFVN30 trong parking (creation-capacity) ở NAV 200B/500B — xem gỡ được bao nhiêu alpha-mất. Xem §5.

## 2. Bản deploy (đã wire vào production pt_v22_dt5g.py)
3 thành phần thêm lượt này (changelog ở docstring pt_v22_dt5g.py):
1. **postbull gate** (`postbull_block`): hard-block CAPIT washout nếu (VNINDEX trailing-2yr ret ≥60%) AND (dd-từ-đỉnh-1y > −15%). = "đừng bắt dao hậu-bull-mạnh chưa điều chỉnh". Generalize 2007/2018/2022.
2. **edge-conditional allocator** (`w_lag_target`): tilt LAG→0.65 ở NEUTRAL/BULL/EXBULL CHỈ khi LAG edge-health `mean12` (data/lag_edge_health.csv, trailing-12M LAG post-ret) ≥ 4%; else 0.50. BEAR=0/CRISIS=0.50.
3. **strict ETF cap** (`ETF_LIQ_KW`): E1VFVN30 parking cap 20% × ADV-thứ-cấp-60d/ngày, fill nhiều ngày.

**Số bản deploy (FULL 2014→now, BQ-auditable):**
| config | CAGR | Sharpe | MaxDD | Calmar | file data/ |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V2.3A+postbull+edge (creation/uncapped ETF) | 24.64 | 1.82 | −20.3 | 1.22 | v23_golive_audit_2014_now_matpostbull_shrink0_edge[_etfliqcreation].csv |
| **V2.3A+postbull+edge+STRICT ETF (PRODUCTION)** | **23.68** | **1.96** | **−17.2** | **1.37** | v23_..._edge_etfliqstrict.csv |
| V2.3C+postbull (no allocator, min-DD alt) | 23.35 | 1.72 | −19.0 | 1.23 | v23c_..._matpostbull_shrink0.csv |
| V2.2-base (no CAPIT, robust floor) | 21.23 | 1.58 | −18.5 | 1.14 | v22base_audit_2014_now.csv |
VNINDEX B&H 10.7%/0.65/−45.3. Bracket số thật theo ETF-liquidity: **strict 23.68 ↔ creation 24.64** (creation = dùng primary-creation, khả thi quy mô tổ chức).

**Window thực tế 2025-06-09→nay (strict):** +10.68% vs VNINDEX +36.4% — TỤT vì sóng VIC-led narrow (điểm yếu cấu hữu, không phải bug). File `..._edge_etfliqstrict_from20250609.csv`.

## 3. Audit infrastructure — chạy & verify
**Engine**: `simulate_holistic_nav.py` (KHÔNG sửa logic core; chỉ THÊM param tùy chọn `etf_adv_lookup`/`etf_liquidity_pct` default off; cột carry cho lãi-vay-cash-âm).
**Harness chính**: `pt_v23_audit_2014.py` — args + env:
```
python pt_v23_audit_2014.py <MODE> <cap> <maturity> <ew2d_shrink> <edge>
  MODE: v23a (allocator+CAPIT) | v23c (static 50/50+CAPIT) | v22base (no CAPIT)
  cap: none | 0.15 ...  (per-event CAPIT cap)
  maturity: off | smooth | gate15 | ew2d | postbull
  ew2d_shrink (argv4): 0.0 = hard-block; default 0.30
  edge (argv5): "edge" = edge-conditional allocator
  ENV: AUDIT_START=YYYY-MM-DD (windowed) | NAV_TOTAL_B=200 (capacity) | ETF_LIQ=off|strict|creation
DEPLOY run: python pt_v23_audit_2014.py v23a none postbull 0.0 edge   (+ ETF_LIQ=strict)
```
**Verifier (đóng vai bot ngoài)**: `data/v23_audit_spotcheck.py N <file>` (allocator files) hoặc `data/audit_spotcheck_generic.py N <file>` (V11/V12.1, đọc nhãn sổ từ META). Kiểm: giá vs BQ 0 mismatch, cash-flow identity 0 VND, allocator-replay (qua cột w_lag_tgt) 0 VND, metric dựng-lại khớp.
**Emitter dùng chung**: `audit_lib.py` (N-sổ; combined_override cho ensemble; cột cash_carry).
**Scripts khác**: `pt_v11_audit_2014.py`, `pt_v121_audit_2014.py`, `pt_lagvn30_audit_2014.py` (argv full/vn30).
**Output 1-file**: record_type META(quy trình verify)/TX/DAILY/METRIC/EVENT_CAPIT/REBAL/ANNUAL.

## 4. Tally tất cả bản đã audit (FULL 2014→now, BQ-thuần T+1 Open) — xem [[audited_versions_tally_2026]]
V2.3 family 21-24% > V11 (momentum-only) 19.80 > V12.1 (ensemble switch) 16.85. One-wallet LAGGED+VN30/full-BAL (17-18%) THUA two-book silo (silo = feature). CAPIT-gate journey: uncapped risk-neg → ew2d → postbull-hardblock thắng base mọi trục.

> beta-thật-của-rổ-PIT, đừng claim nguyên +8.1pp. Files: custom_basket.py, ETF_LIQ=custom, basket_capacity_compare.py.

### (lịch sử) đề bài gốc — backtest rổ VN30-custom-ex-VIC parking ở NAV lớn
**Mục tiêu**: ở 200B/500B, deploy config mất alpha vì tiền-nhàn-phình (58-65% NAV) chỉ park được ít vào E1VFVN30 (strict cap ~2-4B/day). Thay E1VFVN30 bằng **rổ VN30-custom (ex-VIC, có thể quality-tilt 8L)** có **creation-capacity** (~2320B/day = ~100x ETF) → xem gỡ được bao nhiêu CAGR ở 200-500B.
**Cách làm đề xuất**:
1. Tạo chuỗi giá tổng hợp "custom-basket" = return rổ VN30-ex-VIC (cap-weight hoặc quality-tilt) hàng ngày từ tav2_bq.ticker. Dùng nó thay `vn30_underlying` (vehicle parking).
2. ETF ADV cap = 20% × tổng trading-value rổ (creation-capacity), truyền qua `etf_adv_lookup`/`etf_liquidity_pct` (= mode "creation" nhưng vehicle là rổ custom thay ETF).
3. Chạy ở NAV_TOTAL_B=50/100/200/500, so vs strict-E1VFVN30 (bảng §6) → đo alpha gỡ lại.
**Kỳ vọng**: ở 200-500B, custom-basket-creation sẽ kéo CAGR lên gần mức 50B (vì tiền nhàn có chỗ deploy công-suất-lớn), nhưng là BETA có-kiểm-soát (ex-VIC). Lưu ý: cần kiểm rổ-ex-VIC có làm xấu/đẹp beta so VN30 đầy đủ không (2025 VIC kéo index → ex-VIC sẽ bắt ít sóng VIC hơn — đó là CHỦ ĐÍCH, đổi lấy justify-được).
**Caveat**: đây là execution-evolution, không đổi signal. Backtest-tương-đương mode "creation".

## 6. Bảng trần công suất (deploy config, strict ETF, full-history) — xem [[capacity-ceiling-custom-vn30-2026]]
| NAV | CAGR | Sharpe | DD | Calmar | cổ phiếu% | tiền-nhàn% | ETF% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 50B | 23.68 | 1.96 | −17.2 | 1.37 | 35 | 46 | 12 |
| 100B | 20.17 | 1.78 | −15.2 | 1.33 | 35 | 51 | 9 |
| 200B | 17.86 | 1.69 | −14.4 | 1.24 | 34 | 58 | 6 |
| 500B | 13.11 | 1.35 | −15.7 | 0.83 | 35 | 65 | 3 |
Cơ chế: cổ-phiếu% đứng ~35% mọi NAV → nút thắt = ETF parking không hấp thụ tiền nhàn (tiền-nhàn phình 46→65%). Ngưỡng ~200B (mất ¼ alpha). → đó là lý do cần rổ custom (§5).

## 7. Memory files đã ghi lượt này (load tự động qua MEMORY.md)
- `audited_versions_tally_2026.md` — bảng tổng mọi bản + ETF-cap + postbull + edge-alloc.
- `v23_audit_2014_now_deliverable.md` — chi tiết hành trình CAPIT gate (cap/maturity/ew2d/postbull/hard-block), cơ chế DD, walk-forward.
- `capacity_ceiling_custom_vn30_2026.md` — trần ~200B + thiết kế rổ custom.
- `simulation_[REDACTED]_audit_default.md` — quy ước audit + DT5G default.
- `capit_selection_study_2026.md` — chọn-mã CAPIT (chỉ golden PB_z robust).

## 8. Quy ước cố định (standing)
1. Chạy simulation/backtest → MẶC ĐỊNH kèm audit (1-file BQ-verifiable + spot-check; không báo "xong" nếu chưa pass).

content.text:
**Key finding — HAG passed legitimately, but the gate has a blind spot.** HAG's 8L rating was recently **upgraded to 2** (COMPOUNDER, from rating-3 in 2025) on its reported-earnings recovery + FSCORE 6. But its **operating cash flow is erratic/negative** (2025Q2 −1,092B, 2025Q3 −52B, then +2,272B) — exactly the accrual/cash red flag your forensic caught. So the 8L *rating* trusts reported earnings; it doesn't fully see cash quality.

This isn't a bug — it's the gate's design limit. Let me quantify the **quality↔liquidity tradeoff** to answer you with numbers:

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv 'WITH liq AS (
  SELECT t.ticker, AVG(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close) liq
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE "2026-01-01" AND DATE "2026-04-01"
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune t2) AND t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY t.ticker),
rat AS (SELECT ticker, rating FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings_8l QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY time DESC)=1),
fin AS (SELECT ticker, CF_OA_3Y, CF_OA_P0 FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY time DESC)=1)
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY liq.liq DESC) rk, liq.ticker, ROUND(liq.liq/1e9,0) liqB, rat.rating, ROUND(fin.CF_OA_3Y,3) cfoa3y
FROM liq LEFT JOIN rat USING(ticker) LEFT JOIN fin USING(ticker)
WHERE rat.rating<=3 ORDER BY liq.liq DESC LIMIT 40' 2>&1 | tail -42

content.text:
Đây là bảng top-40 mã đã qua gate (rating≤3) ở rebal gần nhất, kèm CF_OA_3Y (dòng tiền hoạt động cộng dồn 3 năm):

## 1. Vì sao HAG lọt — và tại sao siết rating KHÔNG giải quyết
HAG được 8L **nâng lên rating 2** (COMPOUNDER, từ rating-3 năm 2025) nhờ lãi báo cáo hồi phục + FSCORE 6. CF_OA_3Y của HAG = **+259 tỷ (gần như 0)** trên một doanh nghiệp cỡ đó → đúng lo ngại forensic của bạn: **8L tin lãi báo cáo, không thấy chất lượng dòng tiền**. 

→ Hệ quả quan trọng: **siết gate xuống ≤2 KHÔNG loại được HAG** (nó đang là rating-2). Vấn đề nằm ở *cách 8L chấm HAG*, không phải ở ngưỡng.

## 2. Trả lời thẳng: quality-shift có hại thanh khoản không? **Gần như KHÔNG**
Rổ parking dư thanh khoản ~**100×** nhu cầu (tổng ~12,300 tỷ/ngày → parkable 2,459 tỷ/ngày). Bỏ một mã nghi ngờ và lấp bằng mã kế tiếp gần như miễn phí:
- HAG ở **hạng 28** (155 tỷ/ngày ≈ **1.3%** thanh khoản rổ). Bỏ HAG → lấp bằng hạng 31 TPB (137 tỷ) → **mất ~0.15% capacity**. Vô nghĩa.
- Còn cả tá mã chất lượng chờ ở hạng 31-40 (TPB, DBC, PC1, DCM, VCG, IDC, PVT, HAH, GMD...) để backfill.

→ Thanh khoản **chỉ thành vấn đề nếu siết tới mức <~20-25 mã liquid sống sót** — ta còn cách rất xa ngưỡng đó. Vậy: **siết chất lượng vừa phải = ~0 chi phí thanh khoản.**

## 3. CẢNH BÁO: đừng dùng "CFO>0" kiểu mù sector
Nhìn cột CF_OA_3Y: **SSI −29,383 · VIX −16,993 · SHS −7,632 · VCI −16,530 · VND −9,369 · HCM −29,434** — toàn **âm**. Nhưng đây là **chứng khoán**: CFO âm là cấu trúc (cho vay margin + tài sản kinh doanh phình khi thị trường lên), KHÔNG phải red-flag lãi ảo. Một screen "CFO>0" mù sector sẽ **giết oan 6 broker liquid nhất** trong khi vẫn để lọt HAG (HAG CFO_3Y dương). Cash-screen **phải sector-aware**.

## 4. Fix bài bản (đúng tinh thần "luật, không ngoại lệ") — 2 hướng
- **Hướng A (sâu, đúng gốc):** cải thiện **chính rating 8L** để bắt chất lượng-dòng-tiền/lãi-một-lần (mẫu hình forensic HAG: NP>GP, CFO/NP conversion thấp, AR/revenue cao) → HAG sẽ tự về rating 4-5 → **gate parking + mọi nơi dùng 8L đều hưởng**. Đây là sửa luật tận gốc, không patch riêng parking.
- **Hướng B (nhanh, rẻ, sector-aware):** thêm 1 sub-gate dòng-tiền cho **nhóm phi tài chính** (vd phi-bank/phi-broker: yêu cầu CF_OA_3Y ≥ sàn dương nhỏ HOẶC tỷ lệ chuyển đổi CFO/NP trung bình ≥ ngưỡng). Loại được HAG-type, chừa broker, **chi phí thanh khoản ~0** (headroom 100×).

**Khuyến nghị:** vì là vehicle parking (HAG hạng 28 = cap-weight rất nhỏ, hold 1 quý, rủi ro thực tế thấp), không gấp. Nhưng nếu bạn muốn yên tâm ngay, **Hướng B** là quick-win rẻ và đúng nguyên tắc; **Hướng A** là dự án cải thiện 8L riêng (giá trị lan tỏa lớn hơn).

Bạn muốn tôi làm Hướng B (thêm sub-gate cash-conversion sector-aware vào `build_pit`, re-run + spot-check, xác nhận thanh khoản/capacity gần như không đổi) không? Hay để HAG đó (weight nhỏ) và ưu tiên Hướng A cải thiện rating 8L?

23

27	 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
28	 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap",
29	 "CSV":"caustic_soda"}  # CSV = chlor-alkali (NaOH+chlorine+PVC), NOT dap fertilizer — own caustic-soda cycle
30	SUGAR_SET = {"SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"}
31	
32	def bq(sql):
33	    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
34	        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
35	    try:
36	        r = subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false '
37	                           f'--project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',
38	                           capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300, shell=True)
39	    finally:
40	        try: os.unlink(tmp)
41	        except Exception: pass
42	    if not r.stdout.strip(): raise RuntimeError("bq no rows. stderr:\n"+r.stderr[-1500:])
43	    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
44	
45	MAIN_SQL = """
46	WITH L AS (SELECT MAX(time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m)
47	SELECT t.ticker, t.ICB_Code,
48	  t.ROIC3Y, t.ROIC_Min3Y, t.ROE_Min3Y, t.ROIC_Trailing, t.ROIC5Y, t.ROIC_Min5Y, t.ROE_Min5Y, t.ROE5Y, t.Debt_Eq_P0, t.FSCORE,
49	  t.CF_OA_P0, t.CF_OA_P1, t.CF_OA_P2, t.CF_OA_P3,
50	  t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P2, t.NP_P3,
51	  t.PB, t.PE, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y, NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0)),2) AS pb_z,
52	  ROUND(t.Trading_Value_1M_P50/1e9,2) AS liq_bn,
53	  ROUND((SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close,t.HI_3M_T1)-1)*100,1) AS drop_pct
54	FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t, L
55	WHERE t.time = L.mx
56	"""
57	# GPM_P0 + ROE_Trailing + REAL leverage (STLTDebt_Eq = interest-bearing debt/equity, NOT total-liab)
58	# + UnearnRev (người mua trả tiền trước / deferred revenue = RE forward-recognition pipeline)
59	FIN_SQL = """
60	SELECT ticker, GPM_P0,GPM_P1,GPM_P2,GPM_P3,GPM_P4,GPM_P5,GPM_P6,GPM_P7,
61	       ROE_Trailing, ROE3Y, STLTDebt_Eq_P0, UnearnRev_P0, totalAsset_P0,
62	       (SELECT COUNTIF(n<0) FROM UNNEST([NP_P0,NP_P1,NP_P2,NP_P3,NP_P4,NP_P5,NP_P6,NP_P7]) n) AS neg_q
63	FROM (
64	  SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
65	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS t)
66	WHERE rn = 1
67	"""
68	
69	INSURANCE_ICB  = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8530 <= c <= 8579   # 853x nonlife + 857x life insurance
70	SECURITIES_ICB = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8770 <= c <= 8779   # 877x brokers / investment services
71	# diversified holdings classified ICB 7535 but NOT pure power producers -> route as COMPOUNDER
72	HOLDING_OVERRIDE = {"REE"}  # office leasing + M&E + water + power investments (user-confirmed multi-sector)
73	# ICB-mislabeled real-estate (pivoted businesses still tagged by old ICB) -> route as REALESTATE
74	REALESTATE_OVERRIDE = {"HHS"}  # Hoàng Huy: ICB 3353 (trucks, stale) but now a property/holding play (sister of TCH)
75	
76	# ---------- scorecards ----------
77	def real_lev(r):
78	    """Interest-bearing debt/equity (STLTDebt_Eq). Debt_Eq_P0 is TOTAL-liabilities/equity — it counts
79	    customer advances (người mua trả tiền trước) + payables + deferred rev as 'debt', wildly overstating
80	    leverage for real-estate/industrial-park (NTC 3.82 total-liab vs 0.03 real-debt). Fall back if null."""
81	    v = r.get("STLTDebt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
82	    return v if pd.notna(v) else r.get("Debt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
83	
84	def moat_tag(r, roe5y):
85	    """Moat = durable pricing power. Built from GPM LEVEL + GPM STABILITY (stable high margins across
86	    8 quarters = pricing power that competitors can't erode) + ROE level. GPM/ROE are fractions in BQ.
87	    User-prioritized signal for long-term holds -> upgrades rating (see rate_row)."""
88	    gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]
89	    gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
90	    if not gpms: return "WEAK"
91	    gmean = float(np.mean(gpms))
92	    cv = (float(np.std(gpms))/gmean) if gmean > 0 else 9.0          # coefficient of variation
93	    hi_level  = gmean >= 0.25                                       # high gross margin
94	    stable    = (len(gpms) >= 4 and cv <= 0.20)                    # margins don't swing = pricing power
95	    hi_roe    = pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y >= 0.15
96	    if gmean < 0.15 or (pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y < 0.10): return "WEAK"
97	    # STRONG = high stable margin + decent returns (durable moat); else MODERATE
98	    if hi_level and stable and hi_roe: return "STRONG"
99	    if (hi_level and (stable or hi_roe)) or (stable and hi_roe): return "MODERATE+"
100	    return "MODERATE"
101	
102	def core_score(r):
103	    """6-axis validated scorecard (max 12). Returns (score, cfo_np)."""
104	    ttm_cfo = sum(r.get("CF_OA_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
105	    ttm_np  = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i,    np.nan) for i in range(4))
106	    cfo_np  = (ttm_cfo/ttm_np) if (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np != 0) else np.nan
107	    # 3Y windows (not 5Y): hard 5Y-min junked COVID-hit monopolies (ACV/SAS ROIC_min5Y<0 but 3Y +13%/+11%).
108	    # 3Y is responsive and excludes stale one-off shocks (user directive [REDACTED]02).
109	    roic, roicm, roe_tr, de, fs = r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"]
110	    s  = (2 if roic>=0.15 else 1 if roic>=0.10 else 0) if pd.notna(roic) else 0       # avg ROIC quality (3Y)
111	    s += (2 if roicm>=0.10 else 1 if roicm>=0.05 else 0) if pd.notna(roicm) else 0    # ROIC floor (3Y, durability)
112	    s += (2 if roe_tr>=0.18 else 1 if roe_tr>=0.12 else 0) if pd.notna(roe_tr) else 0 # CURRENT profitability (ROE_Trailing, not stale _Min5Y)
113	    s += (2 if de<=0.3 else 1 if de<=1.0 else 0) if pd.notna(de) else 0
114	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=1.0 and ttm_cfo>0) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.7) else 0)
115	    s += (2 if fs>=8 else 1 if fs>=6 else 0) if pd.notna(fs) else 0
116	    return s, (round(cfo_np,2) if pd.notna(cfo_np) else np.nan), ttm_np
117	
118	def stability(r):
119	    """0.4..1.0 — how STABLE profitability is (the real moat). Penalizes (a) volatile gross margin and
120	    (b) cyclical-peak earnings (trailing ROE >> 3Y avg = unsustainable peak, e.g. brokers in a bull mkt).
121	    User [REDACTED]02: stability matters more than a high current number (VIX/CTS high ROE ≠ moat)."""
122	    s = 1.0
123	    if r.get("route") not in ("BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"):   # GPM meaningless for financials
124	        gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]; gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
125	        if len(gpms) >= 4:
126	            m = float(np.mean(gpms))
127	            if m > 0:
128	                cv = float(np.std(gpms))/m
129	                s = min(s, 1.0 if cv<=0.20 else 0.8 if cv<=0.40 else 0.55)   # margin volatility
130	    rt, r3 = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
131	    if pd.notna(rt) and pd.notna(r3) and r3 > 0:
132	        ratio = rt/r3
133	        s = min(s, 1.0 if ratio<=1.3 else 0.75 if ratio<=1.8 else 0.5)   # cyclical-peak detection
134	    return round(s, 2)
135	
136	def redflag(r, ttm_np):
137	    # MINIMAL hard red-flags (user [REDACTED]02: "hạn chế red-flag, để scorecard tự làm việc").
138	    # A single weak QUARTER must not junk a name — judge on the ANNUAL/TTM result.
139	    #   - ROIC_Min3Y<0 REMOVED: it's a quarterly-min artifact (PVS NP_TTM +1934bn but ROIC_min −0.016 → was 5).
140	    #     Weak ROIC still costs scorecard points (0), so the rating system handles it without a cliff.
141	    #   - Keep ONLY genuine structural distress: trailing-YEAR actually lost money, or extreme real leverage.
142	    rs = []
143	    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: rs.append("NP_TTM<0")        # full-year loss = genuine
144	    lev = real_lev(r)
145	    if pd.notna(lev) and lev > 3: rs.append("debt/eq>3")             # interest-bearing debt >3x equity
146	    return ",".join(rs)
147	
148	def bin_core(s):   # validated bins (max 12)
149	    return 1 if s>=10 else 2 if s>=7 else 3 if s>=4 else 4 if s>=2 else 5
150	
151	def rate_securities(r):
152	    """ICB 877x brokers/securities. Financial business: ROIC low/meaningless, leverage = margin-funding
153	    borrowings (operational, like a bank's), FSCORE/GPM/cash-conversion N/A. Earnings HIGHLY CYCLICAL
154	    (track market turnover + margin balances) -> cap at 2. Rate on ROE level + consistency."""
155	    roe = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
156	    if pd.isna(roe): roe = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)        # ROE_Trailing often missing for brokers
157	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
158	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe
159	    ttm_np = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
160	    if (pd.notna(roe) and roe < 0) or (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0): return 5, "sec: lossmaking"
161	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.13 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.11: return 2, "sec strong ROE"   # cap 2 (cyclical)
162	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.09 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.07: return 3, "sec ok ROE"
163	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.05: return 4, "sec weak ROE"
164	    return 5, "sec poor/trough"
165	
166	def rate_insurance(r):
167	    """ICB 853x/857x. ROIC/GPM/FSCORE/Debt_Eq are ALL meaningless for insurers (capital = investment
168	    portfolio + float; technical reserves are operational liabilities like a bank's deposits, not debt).
169	    Cat-event losses (storms/accidents) spike one period then recover -> rate on ROE LEVEL + CONSISTENCY
170	    (ROE_Trailing current + ROE3Y avg, which smooths a single cat year). User-requested own lens [REDACTED]02."""
171	    roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
172	    if pd.isna(roe_tr): roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Min3Y", np.nan)         # fallback
173	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr < 0: return 5, "ins: currently lossmaking"
174	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
175	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe_tr
176	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.15 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.12: return 1, "ins elite ROE"
177	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.11 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.09: return 2, "ins strong ROE"
178	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.07: return 3, "ins ok ROE"
179	    if pd.notna(roe_tr): return 4, "ins weak ROE"
180	    return 4, "ins no-data"
181	
182	def rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np):
183	    """ICB 8633 real-estate / industrial-park (L8 asset-play). The COMPOUNDER red-flags misfire here:
184	    prepaid land-lease revenue is booked as LIABILITY (inflates D/E) and land-bank acquisition years
185	    show NEGATIVE operating cash — neither is distress. So: red-flag only on genuine TTM losses,
186	    grade ROE_Trailing (realized) + ROIC + LENIENT leverage + lumpy-tolerant cash; cap at 2 (cyclical/lumpy)."""
187	    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: return 5, "NP_TTM<0"
188	    roe_tr, roic, de, fs, roicm = r.get("ROE_Trailing",np.nan), r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"], r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan)
189	    unearn, assets = r.get("UnearnRev_P0",np.nan), r.get("totalAsset_P0",np.nan)
190	    pipeline = (unearn/assets) if (pd.notna(unearn) and pd.notna(assets) and assets>0) else np.nan
191	    s  = (2 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.18) else 1 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.10) else 0)
192	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.12) else 1 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.07) else 0)
193	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=0.5) else 1 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=1.5) else 0)   # REAL debt (interest-bearing), not total-liab
194	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.8) else 0)                                 # lumpy -> light weight
195	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(fs) and fs>=6) else 0)
196	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(roicm) and roicm>=0) else 0)                                     # never destroyed capital
197	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(pipeline) and pipeline>=0.15) else 0)                            # người mua trả tiền trước = doanh thu tương lai đã bán
198	    # capped at 2 (lumpy/cyclical earnings); FLOOR 4 — land-bank asset backing limits permanent
199	    # impairment, so a profitable RE name never hits 5 (only genuine TTM losers, handled above)
200	    rating = 2 if s>=6 else 3 if s>=4 else 4
201	    return rating, f"RE asset-play (s{s})"
202	
203	def rate_row(r):
204	    """returns dict with rating + diagnostics."""
205	    route = r["route"]
206	    s, cfo_np, ttm_np = core_score(r)
207	    moat = moat_tag(r, r["ROE5Y"])
208	    rf = redflag(r, ttm_np)
209	    note = ""
210	    if route == "SECURITIES":
211	        rating, note = rate_securities(r)
212	    elif route == "INSURANCE":
213	        rating, note = rate_insurance(r)
214	    elif route == "REALESTATE":
215	        rating, note = rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np)
216	    elif route == "BANK":
217	        rating, note = rate_bank(r)
218	    elif route == "POWER":
219	        rating, note = rate_power(r)
220	    elif route == "CYCLICAL":
221	        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
222	        elif pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r) > 1.5: rating = 5; note = "debt/eq>1.5 trough-fragile"
223	        else:
224	            prelim = bin_core(s)
225	            fortress = (pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r)<=0.2 and pd.notna(r.get("ROIC3Y")) and r["ROIC3Y"]>=0.20)
226	            rating = prelim if prelim>=2 else (1 if fortress else 2)  # cap at 2 unless fortress
227	            note = "cap2" if (prelim<2 and not fortress) else ("fortress" if fortress else "")
228	    else:  # COMPOUNDER
229	        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
230	        else:
231	            prelim = bin_core(s)
232	            # Moat is prioritized for long-term holds -> STRONG upgrades one notch (3->2 and 2->1)
233	            rating = prelim
234	            if moat=="STRONG" and prelim in (2,3):
235	                rating = prelim-1; note = "moat↑1"
236	            # No ROE_Min/ROIC_Min hard gate (user): a single weak quarter in 3Y must not cap a name whose
237	            # annual result is fine. The scorecard's ROIC/ROE/cash axes already score weak names low.
238	            # Rating 5 = IMPAIRED (lossmaking / over-leveraged = the red-flag branch). A PROFITABLE company,
239	            # however thin (e.g. CTD: GPM 4%, weak CFO, but NP+ & net-cash), is at worst speculative=4 not 5.
240	            if rating == 5: rating = 4; note = (note+" " if note else "")+"profitable→4"
241	    rf_disp = rf if route in ("COMPOUNDER", "CYCLICAL") else ""  # D/E doesn't apply to bank/power/realestate
242	    return dict(rating=rating, core_score=s, moat=moat, stab=stability(r), cfo_np=cfo_np, note=note, redflag=rf_disp)
243	
244	# bank rating from cached lens v3 (gate + metrics)
245	BANKD = {}
246	def rate_bank(r):
247	    """ROE (franchise strength) is the BASE; asset quality (NPL+coverage) is a DIFFERENTIATOR for the
248	    top grades, NOT a hard kill-switch. Market prizes AQ as a PREMIUM (VCB→1) but a high-NPL bank with
249	    strong ROE+capital is still investable (VPB: NPL 3.6% but ROE 15.5%/CAR 14.3% → 3, not 5).
250	    Only a genuinely weak franchise (low ROE) → 5. (Replaces the old NPL>3%-AVOID cliff, user [REDACTED]02.)"""
251	    b = BANKD.get(r["ticker"])
252	    if not b: return 3, "bank-nodata"
253	    roe, npl, cov = b.get("ROE"), b.get("NPL"), b.get("coverage")
254	    if pd.isna(roe): return 3, "bank-noROE"
255	    if roe < 0.08: return 5, "weak franchise (ROE<8%)"          # only genuine weakness -> 5
256	    pristine = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.012 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=1.5
257	    strong   = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.020 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=0.9
258	    if roe>=0.15 and pristine: return 1, "elite asset-quality"
259	    if roe>=0.14 and strong:   return 2, "strong asset-quality"
260	    if roe>=0.12: return 3, "profitable (AQ-modulated)"         # high-NPL-but-profitable (VPB/HDB) land here
261	    return 4, "modest ROE"
262	
263	POWERD = {}
264	def rate_power(r):
265	    p = POWERD.get(r["ticker"])
266	    if not p: return 3, "power-nodata"
267	    v = str(p["verdict"]).upper(); cfo = p.get("cfo_ttm_bn", np.nan)
268	    if "MATURE" in v: return 2, "MATURE_YIELD"
269	    if "PRE_INFLECTION" in v: return 3, "PRE_INFLECTION buy-zone"
270	    if "STRESS" in v or "AVOID" in str(p.get("action","")).upper():
271	        return (5 if (pd.notna(cfo) and cfo<0) else 4), "DEBT_STRESS"
272	    return 3, "power-other"
273	
274	def main():
275	    df = bq(MAIN_SQL)
276	    try:
277	        fin = bq(FIN_SQL); df = df.merge(fin, on="ticker", how="left")
278	    except Exception as e:
279	        print("financial merge skipped:", e); df["GPM_P0"] = np.nan; df["ROE_Trailing"] = np.nan
280	
281	    # load sector lenses
282	    global BANKD, POWERD
283	    try:
284	        bank = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))
285	        BANKD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in bank.iterrows()}
286	        bank_set = set(bank["ticker"])
287	    except Exception as e:
288	        print("bank lens load fail:", e); bank_set = set()
289	    try:
290	        power = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","power_lens.csv"))
291	        POWERD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in power.iterrows()}
292	        power_set = set(power["ticker"]) - bank_set
293	    except Exception as e:
294	        print("power lens load fail:", e); power_set = set()
295	
296	    def route_of(r):
297	        if r["ticker"] in HOLDING_OVERRIDE: return "COMPOUNDER"   # diversified holdings (REE) misfiled as power
298	        if r["ticker"] in REALESTATE_OVERRIDE: return "REALESTATE" # ICB-mislabeled RE (HHS)
299	        if r["ticker"] in bank_set or r["ICB_Code"]==8355: return "BANK"
300	        if INSURANCE_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "INSURANCE"   # 853x/857x: own lens (ROE-based, ROIC meaningless)
301	        if SECURITIES_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "SECURITIES" # 877x brokers: ROE-based, cyclical cap 2
302	        if r["ticker"] in power_set: return "POWER"
303	        if r["ticker"] in COMMODITY_MAP or r["ticker"] in SUGAR_SET: return "CYCLICAL"
304	        if r["ICB_Code"]==8633: return "REALESTATE"   # L8 asset-play: deferred-rev/lumpy-CFO -> own lens
305	        return "COMPOUNDER"
306	    df["route"] = df.apply(route_of, axis=1)
307	
308	    res = df.apply(lambda r: pd.Series(rate_row(r)), axis=1)
309	    out = pd.concat([df, res], axis=1)
310	
311	    cols = ["ticker","route","rating","core_score","stab","moat","note","redflag",
312	            "ROIC3Y","ROIC_Min3Y","ROE_Min3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE3Y","ROIC_Trailing","neg_q","ROE_Min5Y","ROIC_Min5Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","Debt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","GPM_P0",
313	            "PB","pb_z","PE","drop_pct","liq_bn","ICB_Code"]
314	    out = out[cols].sort_values(["route","rating","core_score"], ascending=[True,True,False])
315	    os.makedirs(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data"), exist_ok=True)
316	    path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l.csv")
317	    try:
318	        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
319	    except PermissionError:
320	        path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_NEW.csv")
321	        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
322	        print(f"[!] data/rating_8l.csv is locked (open in Excel?) -> wrote {os.path.basename(path)} instead")
323	
324	    # ---- summary ----
325	    print(f"rated {len(out)} tickers -> data/rating_8l.csv")
326	    print("\ndistribution by route x rating:")
327	    print(pd.crosstab(out["route"], out["rating"]).to_string())
328	    known = ["VNM","FPT","MWG","HPG","QTP","MBB","VCB","ACB","VCS","DGC","REE","PVT","GAS","PNJ","DHC","BMP","NT2","DRI","PHR","SAB","VHC","GVR"]
329	    sub = out[out["ticker"].isin(known)].copy()
330	    sub["k"] = pd.Categorical(sub["ticker"], categories=known, ordered=True)
331	    sub = sub.sort_values("k")
332	    print("\nknown names (review):")
333	    print(sub[["ticker","route","rating","core_score","moat","ROIC3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min3Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","note","redflag"]].to_string(index=False))
334	
335	    # ---- TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3), ranked by rating then a route-aware quality score ----
336	    LIQ_MIN = 3.0   # bn VND/day — needs to be actually tradable to count as "investable"
337	    FIN = {"BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"}
338	    def qual(r):
339	        if r["route"] in FIN:   # financials: scorecard N/A -> quality = ROE (trailing, fallback 3Y)
340	            roe = r["ROE_Trailing"] if pd.notna(r["ROE_Trailing"]) else r["ROE3Y"]
341	            return min(12.0, (roe if pd.notna(roe) else 0)*60)   # ROE 0.20 -> 12 (≈ top core_score)
342	        return r["core_score"]
343	    inv = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN)].copy()
344	    inv["qual"] = inv.apply(qual, axis=1)
345	    # STABILITY is prioritized (user): quality is discounted by how stable/through-cycle it is, so a
346	    # cyclical-peak high-ROE broker (VIX/CTS) ranks BELOW a stable compounder of similar headline quality.
347	    inv["qual_adj"] = (inv["qual"] * inv["stab"]).round(1)
348	    inv["rank_score"] = (3 - inv["rating"])*100 + inv["qual_adj"]   # rating dominates; stability-adj quality breaks ties
349	    top = inv.sort_values(["rank_score","liq_bn"], ascending=False).head(30).reset_index(drop=True)
350	    top.index = top.index + 1
351	    top.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_top30.csv"))
352	    # valuation state per name (axis 2): PB vs its OWN 5Y history (pb_z) + drawdown. For quality names
353	    # "cheap" = pb_z<0 (below own normal), DISLOCATED = pb_z<=-1 (the golden-cell buy zone, ~+59%/96% 12M).
354	    def val_state(r):
355	        z, roemin5 = r["pb_z"], r.get("ROE_Min5Y", np.nan)
356	        if pd.isna(z): return "n/a"
357	        # GUARD (user [REDACTED]02): if the company DESTROYED capital in 5Y (ROE_Min5Y<0), its book value
358	        # is unreliable and its historical PB was distorted (HAG: PB_MA5Y 1.66 from a distressed/eroding
359	        # past) -> a low pb_z is a STATISTICAL ARTIFACT, not real cheapness. Flag, don't treat as buy.
360	        if z <= -0.3 and pd.notna(roemin5) and roemin5 < 0: return "0_PBz-TRAP(capital-destroyer)"
361	        if z <= -1.0: return "1_DISLOCATED"        # cheap vs own history = buy zone (book trustworthy)
362	        if z <= -0.3: return "2_below-avg"
363	        if z <=  0.6: return "3_fair"
364	        return "4_rich"
365	    out["val"] = out.apply(val_state, axis=1)
366	    top = top.merge(out[["ticker","val"]], on="ticker", how="left")
367	    print(f"\n=== TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3, liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — ranked by rating x STABILITY-adj quality ===")
368	    show = top[["ticker","route","rating","qual_adj","moat","ROE_Trailing","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","val"]].copy()
369	    print(show.to_string())
370	
371	    # ---- BUY-NOW: quality (rating<=3) x cheap-vs-own-history (pb_z<=-0.3) x BOOK TRUSTWORTHY x liquid ----
372	    cheap = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN) & (out["pb_z"]<=-0.3)].copy()
373	    trap = cheap[cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0]                       # capital-destroyers -> pb_z is an artifact
374	    buy  = cheap[~(cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0)].copy()             # book trustworthy (no 5Y capital destruction)
375	    buy = buy.sort_values(["rating","pb_z"]).reset_index(drop=True); buy.index = buy.index+1
376	    buy.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_buynow.csv"))
377	    print(f"\n=== BUY-NOW (rating<=3 + pb_z<=-0.3 + ROE_Min5Y>=0 book-trustworthy + liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — {len(buy)} names ===")
378	    if len(buy):
379	        print(buy[["ticker","route","rating","moat","stab","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min5Y","liq_bn","val"]].to_string())
380	    else:
381	        print("none — quality names not dislocated right now (market rich). Wait for the pitch.")
382	    if len(trap):
383	        print(f"\n  [EXCLUDED as PB_z-traps — capital-destroyers (ROE_Min5Y<0), distorted book/PB]: "
384	              + ", ".join(f"{t.ticker}(z{t.pb_z:.1f},ROEmin5 {t.ROE_Min5Y:.0%})" for t in trap.itertuples()))
385	
386	if __name__ == "__main__":
387	    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""rating_8l.py — 8L Quality Rating 1-5 (credit-agency-style), sector-aware.

One axis = business durability / permanent-capital-impairment risk (NOT a buy signal).
  1 AAA/AA · 2 A · 3 BBB (lowest investment grade) | 4 BB · 5 B/CCC (speculative).
Router: BANK(ICB8355) / POWER(ICB7535) / CYCLICAL(commodity map+sugar) / COMPOUNDER(rest).
Through-the-cycle (uses _Min5Y floors), sticky, hard red-flag gate. Spec: rating_8l_criteria.md.
Validated (a): bins monotonic on fwd-12M return + downside; 3/4 boundary = dip-opportunity vs trap.

Exports data/rating_8l.csv (review-only; not yet wired into the pipeline).
Usage: python rating_8l.py
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, subprocess, tempfile
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd

WORKDIR = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN  = os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name=="nt" else "bq"))

COMMODITY_MAP = {
 "DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore",
 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap",
 "CSV":"caustic_soda"}  # CSV = chlor-alkali (NaOH+chlorine+PVC), NOT dap fertilizer — own caustic-soda cycle
SUGAR_SET = {"SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"}

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false '
                           f'--project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',
                           capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300, shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except Exception: pass
    if not r.stdout.strip(): raise RuntimeError("bq no rows. stderr:\n"+r.stderr[-1500:])
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

MAIN_SQL = """
WITH L AS (SELECT MAX(time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m)
SELECT t.ticker, t.ICB_Code,
  t.ROIC3Y, t.ROIC_Min3Y, t.ROE_Min3Y, t.ROIC_Trailing, t.ROIC5Y, t.ROIC_Min5Y, t.ROE_Min5Y, t.ROE5Y, t.Debt_Eq_P0, t.FSCORE,
  t.CF_OA_P0, t.CF_OA_P1, t.CF_OA_P2, t.CF_OA_P3,
  t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P2, t.NP_P3,
  t.PB, t.PE, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y, NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0)),2) AS pb_z,
  ROUND(t.Trading_Value_1M_P50/1e9,2) AS liq_bn,
  ROUND((SAFE_DIVIDE(t.Close,t.HI_3M_T1)-1)*100,1) AS drop_pct
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t, L
WHERE t.time = L.mx
"""
# GPM_P0 + ROE_Trailing + REAL leverage (STLTDebt_Eq = interest-bearing debt/equity, NOT total-liab)
# + UnearnRev (người mua trả tiền trước / deferred revenue = RE forward-recognition pipeline)
FIN_SQL = """
SELECT ticker, GPM_P0,GPM_P1,GPM_P2,GPM_P3,GPM_P4,GPM_P5,GPM_P6,GPM_P7,
       ROE_Trailing, ROE3Y, STLTDebt_Eq_P0, UnearnRev_P0, totalAsset_P0,
       (SELECT COUNTIF(n<0) FROM UNNEST([NP_P0,NP_P1,NP_P2,NP_P3,NP_P4,NP_P5,NP_P6,NP_P7]) n) AS neg_q
FROM (
  SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS t)
WHERE rn = 1
"""

INSURANCE_ICB  = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8530 <= c <= 8579   # 853x nonlife + 857x life insurance
SECURITIES_ICB = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8770 <= c <= 8779   # 877x brokers / investment services
# diversified holdings classified ICB 7535 but NOT pure power producers -> route as COMPOUNDER
HOLDING_OVERRIDE = {"REE"}  # office leasing + M&E + water + power investments (user-confirmed multi-sector)
# ICB-mislabeled real-estate (pivoted businesses still tagged by old ICB) -> route as REALESTATE
REALESTATE_OVERRIDE = {"HHS"}  # Hoàng Huy: ICB 3353 (trucks, stale) but now a property/holding play (sister of TCH)

# ---------- scorecards ----------
def real_lev(r):
    """Interest-bearing debt/equity (STLTDebt_Eq). Debt_Eq_P0 is TOTAL-liabilities/equity — it counts
    customer advances (người mua trả tiền trước) + payables + deferred rev as 'debt', wildly overstating
    leverage for real-estate/industrial-park (NTC 3.82 total-liab vs 0.03 real-debt). Fall back if null."""
    v = r.get("STLTDebt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
    return v if pd.notna(v) else r.get("Debt_Eq_P0", np.nan)

def moat_tag(r, roe5y):
    """Moat = durable pricing power. Built from GPM LEVEL + GPM STABILITY (stable high margins across
    8 quarters = pricing power that competitors can't erode) + ROE level. GPM/ROE are fractions in BQ.
    User-prioritized signal for long-term holds -> upgrades rating (see rate_row)."""
    gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]
    gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
    if not gpms: return "WEAK"
    gmean = float(np.mean(gpms))
    cv = (float(np.std(gpms))/gmean) if gmean > 0 else 9.0          # coefficient of variation
    hi_level  = gmean >= 0.25                                       # high gross margin
    stable    = (len(gpms) >= 4 and cv <= 0.20)                    # margins don't swing = pricing power
    hi_roe    = pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y >= 0.15
    if gmean < 0.15 or (pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y < 0.10): return "WEAK"
    # STRONG = high stable margin + decent returns (durable moat); else MODERATE
    if hi_level and stable and hi_roe: return "STRONG"
    if (hi_level and (stable or hi_roe)) or (stable and hi_roe): return "MODERATE+"
    return "MODERATE"

def core_score(r):
    """6-axis validated scorecard (max 12). Returns (score, cfo_np)."""
    ttm_cfo = sum(r.get("CF_OA_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
    ttm_np  = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i,    np.nan) for i in range(4))
    cfo_np  = (ttm_cfo/ttm_np) if (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np != 0) else np.nan
    # 3Y windows (not 5Y): hard 5Y-min junked COVID-hit monopolies (ACV/SAS ROIC_min5Y<0 but 3Y +13%/+11%).
    # 3Y is responsive and excludes stale one-off shocks (user directive [REDACTED]02).
    roic, roicm, roe_tr, de, fs = r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"]
    s  = (2 if roic>=0.15 else 1 if roic>=0.10 else 0) if pd.notna(roic) else 0       # avg ROIC quality (3Y)
    s += (2 if roicm>=0.10 else 1 if roicm>=0.05 else 0) if pd.notna(roicm) else 0    # ROIC floor (3Y, durability)
    s += (2 if roe_tr>=0.18 else 1 if roe_tr>=0.12 else 0) if pd.notna(roe_tr) else 0 # CURRENT profitability (ROE_Trailing, not stale _Min5Y)
    s += (2 if de<=0.3 else 1 if de<=1.0 else 0) if pd.notna(de) else 0
    s += (2 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=1.0 and ttm_cfo>0) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.7) else 0)
    s += (2 if fs>=8 else 1 if fs>=6 else 0) if pd.notna(fs) else 0
    return s, (round(cfo_np,2) if pd.notna(cfo_np) else np.nan), ttm_np

def stability(r):
    """0.4..1.0 — how STABLE profitability is (the real moat). Penalizes (a) volatile gross margin and
    (b) cyclical-peak earnings (trailing ROE >> 3Y avg = unsustainable peak, e.g. brokers in a bull mkt).
    User [REDACTED]02: stability matters more than a high current number (VIX/CTS high ROE ≠ moat)."""
    s = 1.0
    if r.get("route") not in ("BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"):   # GPM meaningless for financials
        gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]; gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
        if len(gpms) >= 4:
            m = float(np.mean(gpms))
            if m > 0:
                cv = float(np.std(gpms))/m
                s = min(s, 1.0 if cv<=0.20 else 0.8 if cv<=0.40 else 0.55)   # margin volatility
    rt, r3 = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
    if pd.notna(rt) and pd.notna(r3) and r3 > 0:
        ratio = rt/r3
        s = min(s, 1.0 if ratio<=1.3 else 0.75 if ratio<=1.8 else 0.5)   # cyclical-peak detection
    return round(s, 2)

def redflag(r, ttm_np):
    # MINIMAL hard red-flags (user [REDACTED]02: "hạn chế red-flag, để scorecard tự làm việc").
    # A single weak QUARTER must not junk a name — judge on the ANNUAL/TTM result.
    #   - ROIC_Min3Y<0 REMOVED: it's a quarterly-min artifact (PVS NP_TTM +1934bn but ROIC_min −0.016 → was 5).
    #     Weak ROIC still costs scorecard points (0), so the rating system handles it without a cliff.
    #   - Keep ONLY genuine structural distress: trailing-YEAR actually lost money, or extreme real leverage.
    rs = []
    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: rs.append("NP_TTM<0")        # full-year loss = genuine
    lev = real_lev(r)
    if pd.notna(lev) and lev > 3: rs.append("debt/eq>3")             # interest-bearing debt >3x equity
    return ",".join(rs)

def bin_core(s):   # validated bins (max 12)
    return 1 if s>=10 else 2 if s>=7 else 3 if s>=4 else 4 if s>=2 else 5

def rate_securities(r):
    """ICB 877x brokers/securities. Financial business: ROIC low/meaningless, leverage = margin-funding
    borrowings (operational, like a bank's), FSCORE/GPM/cash-conversion N/A. Earnings HIGHLY CYCLICAL
    (track market turnover + margin balances) -> cap at 2. Rate on ROE level + consistency."""
    roe = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(roe): roe = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)        # ROE_Trailing often missing for brokers
    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe
    ttm_np = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
    if (pd.notna(roe) and roe < 0) or (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0): return 5, "sec: lossmaking"
    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.13 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.11: return 2, "sec strong ROE"   # cap 2 (cyclical)
    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.09 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.07: return 3, "sec ok ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.05: return 4, "sec weak ROE"
    return 5, "sec poor/trough"

def rate_insurance(r):
    """ICB 853x/857x. ROIC/GPM/FSCORE/Debt_Eq are ALL meaningless for insurers (capital = investment
    portfolio + float; technical reserves are operational liabilities like a bank's deposits, not debt).
    Cat-event losses (storms/accidents) spike one period then recover -> rate on ROE LEVEL + CONSISTENCY
    (ROE_Trailing current + ROE3Y avg, which smooths a single cat year). User-requested own lens [REDACTED]02."""
    roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(roe_tr): roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Min3Y", np.nan)         # fallback
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr < 0: return 5, "ins: currently lossmaking"
    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe_tr
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.15 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.12: return 1, "ins elite ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.11 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.09: return 2, "ins strong ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.07: return 3, "ins ok ROE"
    if pd.notna(roe_tr): return 4, "ins weak ROE"
    return 4, "ins no-data"

def rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np):
    """ICB 8633 real-estate / industrial-park (L8 asset-play). The COMPOUNDER red-flags misfire here:
    prepaid land-lease revenue is booked as LIABILITY (inflates D/E) and land-bank acquisition years
    show NEGATIVE operating cash — neither is distress. So: red-flag only on genuine TTM losses,
    grade ROE_Trailing (realized) + ROIC + LENIENT leverage + lumpy-tolerant cash; cap at 2 (cyclical/lumpy)."""
    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: return 5, "NP_TTM<0"
    roe_tr, roic, de, fs, roicm = r.get("ROE_Trailing",np.nan), r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), real_lev(r), r["FSCORE"], r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan)
    unearn, assets = r.get("UnearnRev_P0",np.nan), r.get("totalAsset_P0",np.nan)
    pipeline = (unearn/assets) if (pd.notna(unearn) and pd.notna(assets) and assets>0) else np.nan
    s  = (2 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.18) else 1 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.10) else 0)
    s += (2 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.12) else 1 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.07) else 0)
    s += (2 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=0.5) else 1 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=1.5) else 0)   # REAL debt (interest-bearing), not total-liab
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.8) else 0)                                 # lumpy -> light weight
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(fs) and fs>=6) else 0)
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(roicm) and roicm>=0) else 0)                                     # never destroyed capital
    s += (1 if (pd.notna(pipeline) and pipeline>=0.15) else 0)                            # người mua trả tiền trước = doanh thu tương lai đã bán
    # capped at 2 (lumpy/cyclical earnings); FLOOR 4 — land-bank asset backing limits permanent
    # impairment, so a profitable RE name never hits 5 (only genuine TTM losers, handled above)
    rating = 2 if s>=6 else 3 if s>=4 else 4
    return rating, f"RE asset-play (s{s})"

def rate_row(r):
    """returns dict with rating + diagnostics."""
    route = r["route"]
    s, cfo_np, ttm_np = core_score(r)
    moat = moat_tag(r, r["ROE5Y"])
    rf = redflag(r, ttm_np)
    note = ""
    if route == "SECURITIES":
        rating, note = rate_securities(r)
    elif route == "INSURANCE":
        rating, note = rate_insurance(r)
    elif route == "REALESTATE":
        rating, note = rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np)
    elif route == "BANK":
        rating, note = rate_bank(r)
    elif route == "POWER":
        rating, note = rate_power(r)
    elif route == "CYCLICAL":
        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
        elif pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r) > 1.5: rating = 5; note = "debt/eq>1.5 trough-fragile"
        else:
            prelim = bin_core(s)
            fortress = (pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r)<=0.2 and pd.notna(r.get("ROIC3Y")) and r["ROIC3Y"]>=0.20)
            rating = prelim if prelim>=2 else (1 if fortress else 2)  # cap at 2 unless fortress
            note = "cap2" if (prelim<2 and not fortress) else ("fortress" if fortress else "")
    else:  # COMPOUNDER
        if rf: rating = 5; note = "redflag:"+rf
        else:
            prelim = bin_core(s)
            # Moat is prioritized for long-term holds -> STRONG upgrades one notch (3->2 and 2->1)
            rating = prelim
            if moat=="STRONG" and prelim in (2,3):
                rating = prelim-1; note = "moat↑1"
            # No ROE_Min/ROIC_Min hard gate (user): a single weak quarter in 3Y must not cap a name whose
            # annual result is fine. The scorecard's ROIC/ROE/cash axes already score weak names low.
            # Rating 5 = IMPAIRED (lossmaking / over-leveraged = the red-flag branch). A PROFITABLE company,
            # however thin (e.g. CTD: GPM 4%, weak CFO, but NP+ & net-cash), is at worst speculative=4 not 5.
            if rating == 5: rating = 4; note = (note+" " if note else "")+"profitable→4"
    rf_disp = rf if route in ("COMPOUNDER", "CYCLICAL") else ""  # D/E doesn't apply to bank/power/realestate
    return dict(rating=rating, core_score=s, moat=moat, stab=stability(r), cfo_np=cfo_np, note=note, redflag=rf_disp)

# bank rating from cached lens v3 (gate + metrics)
BANKD = {}
def rate_bank(r):
    """ROE (franchise strength) is the BASE; asset quality (NPL+coverage) is a DIFFERENTIATOR for the
    top grades, NOT a hard kill-switch. Market prizes AQ as a PREMIUM (VCB→1) but a high-NPL bank with
    strong ROE+capital is still investable (VPB: NPL 3.6% but ROE 15.5%/CAR 14.3% → 3, not 5).
    Only a genuinely weak franchise (low ROE) → 5. (Replaces the old NPL>3%-AVOID cliff, user [REDACTED]02.)"""
    b = BANKD.get(r["ticker"])
    if not b: return 3, "bank-nodata"
    roe, npl, cov = b.get("ROE"), b.get("NPL"), b.get("coverage")
    if pd.isna(roe): return 3, "bank-noROE"
    if roe < 0.08: return 5, "weak franchise (ROE<8%)"          # only genuine weakness -> 5
    pristine = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.012 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=1.5
    strong   = pd.notna(npl) and npl<=0.020 and pd.notna(cov) and cov>=0.9
    if roe>=0.15 and pristine: return 1, "elite asset-quality"
    if roe>=0.14 and strong:   return 2, "strong asset-quality"
    if roe>=0.12: return 3, "profitable (AQ-modulated)"         # high-NPL-but-profitable (VPB/HDB) land here
    return 4, "modest ROE"

POWERD = {}
def rate_power(r):
    p = POWERD.get(r["ticker"])
    if not p: return 3, "power-nodata"
    v = str(p["verdict"]).upper(); cfo = p.get("cfo_ttm_bn", np.nan)
    if "MATURE" in v: return 2, "MATURE_YIELD"
    if "PRE_INFLECTION" in v: return 3, "PRE_INFLECTION buy-zone"
    if "STRESS" in v or "AVOID" in str(p.get("action","")).upper():
        return (5 if (pd.notna(cfo) and cfo<0) else 4), "DEBT_STRESS"
    return 3, "power-other"

def main():
    df = bq(MAIN_SQL)
    try:
        fin = bq(FIN_SQL); df = df.merge(fin, on="ticker", how="left")
    except Exception as e:
        print("financial merge skipped:", e); df["GPM_P0"] = np.nan; df["ROE_Trailing"] = np.nan

    # load sector lenses
    global BANKD, POWERD
    try:
        bank = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))
        BANKD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in bank.iterrows()}
        bank_set = set(bank["ticker"])
    except Exception as e:
        print("bank lens load fail:", e); bank_set = set()
    try:
        power = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","power_lens.csv"))
        POWERD = {row["ticker"]: row.to_dict() for _, row in power.iterrows()}
        power_set = set(power["ticker"]) - bank_set
    except Exception as e:
        print("power lens load fail:", e); power_set = set()

    def route_of(r):
        if r["ticker"] in HOLDING_OVERRIDE: return "COMPOUNDER"   # diversified holdings (REE) misfiled as power
        if r["ticker"] in REALESTATE_OVERRIDE: return "REALESTATE" # ICB-mislabeled RE (HHS)
        if r["ticker"] in bank_set or r["ICB_Code"]==8355: return "BANK"
        if INSURANCE_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "INSURANCE"   # 853x/857x: own lens (ROE-based, ROIC meaningless)
        if SECURITIES_ICB(r["ICB_Code"]): return "SECURITIES" # 877x brokers: ROE-based, cyclical cap 2
        if r["ticker"] in power_set: return "POWER"
        if r["ticker"] in COMMODITY_MAP or r["ticker"] in SUGAR_SET: return "CYCLICAL"
        if r["ICB_Code"]==8633: return "REALESTATE"   # L8 asset-play: deferred-rev/lumpy-CFO -> own lens
        return "COMPOUNDER"
    df["route"] = df.apply(route_of, axis=1)

    res = df.apply(lambda r: pd.Series(rate_row(r)), axis=1)
    out = pd.concat([df, res], axis=1)

    cols = ["ticker","route","rating","core_score","stab","moat","note","redflag",
            "ROIC3Y","ROIC_Min3Y","ROE_Min3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE3Y","ROIC_Trailing","neg_q","ROE_Min5Y","ROIC_Min5Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","Debt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","GPM_P0",
            "PB","pb_z","PE","drop_pct","liq_bn","ICB_Code"]
    out = out[cols].sort_values(["route","rating","core_score"], ascending=[True,True,False])
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data"), exist_ok=True)
    path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l.csv")
    try:
        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
    except PermissionError:
        path = os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_NEW.csv")
        out.to_csv(path, index=False)
        print(f"[!] data/rating_8l.csv is locked (open in Excel?) -> wrote {os.path.basename(path)} instead")

    # ---- summary ----
    print(f"rated {len(out)} tickers -> data/rating_8l.csv")
    print("\ndistribution by route x rating:")
    print(pd.crosstab(out["route"], out["rating"]).to_string())
    known = ["VNM","FPT","MWG","HPG","QTP","MBB","VCB","ACB","VCS","DGC","REE","PVT","GAS","PNJ","DHC","BMP","NT2","DRI","PHR","SAB","VHC","GVR"]
    sub = out[out["ticker"].isin(known)].copy()
    sub["k"] = pd.Categorical(sub["ticker"], categories=known, ordered=True)
    sub = sub.sort_values("k")
    print("\nknown names (review):")
    print(sub[["ticker","route","rating","core_score","moat","ROIC3Y","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min3Y","STLTDebt_Eq_P0","cfo_np","FSCORE","note","redflag"]].to_string(index=False))

    # ---- TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3), ranked by rating then a route-aware quality score ----
    LIQ_MIN = 3.0   # bn VND/day — needs to be actually tradable to count as "investable"
    FIN = {"BANK","INSURANCE","SECURITIES"}
    def qual(r):
        if r["route"] in FIN:   # financials: scorecard N/A -> quality = ROE (trailing, fallback 3Y)
            roe = r["ROE_Trailing"] if pd.notna(r["ROE_Trailing"]) else r["ROE3Y"]
            return min(12.0, (roe if pd.notna(roe) else 0)*60)   # ROE 0.20 -> 12 (≈ top core_score)
        return r["core_score"]
    inv = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN)].copy()
    inv["qual"] = inv.apply(qual, axis=1)
    # STABILITY is prioritized (user): quality is discounted by how stable/through-cycle it is, so a
    # cyclical-peak high-ROE broker (VIX/CTS) ranks BELOW a stable compounder of similar headline quality.
    inv["qual_adj"] = (inv["qual"] * inv["stab"]).round(1)
    inv["rank_score"] = (3 - inv["rating"])*100 + inv["qual_adj"]   # rating dominates; stability-adj quality breaks ties
    top = inv.sort_values(["rank_score","liq_bn"], ascending=False).head(30).reset_index(drop=True)
    top.index = top.index + 1
    top.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_top30.csv"))
    # valuation state per name (axis 2): PB vs its OWN 5Y history (pb_z) + drawdown. For quality names
    # "cheap" = pb_z<0 (below own normal), DISLOCATED = pb_z<=-1 (the golden-cell buy zone, ~+59%/96% 12M).
    def val_state(r):
        z, roemin5 = r["pb_z"], r.get("ROE_Min5Y", np.nan)
        if pd.isna(z): return "n/a"
        # GUARD (user [REDACTED]02): if the company DESTROYED capital in 5Y (ROE_Min5Y<0), its book value
        # is unreliable and its historical PB was distorted (HAG: PB_MA5Y 1.66 from a distressed/eroding
        # past) -> a low pb_z is a STATISTICAL ARTIFACT, not real cheapness. Flag, don't treat as buy.
        if z <= -0.3 and pd.notna(roemin5) and roemin5 < 0: return "0_PBz-TRAP(capital-destroyer)"
        if z <= -1.0: return "1_DISLOCATED"        # cheap vs own history = buy zone (book trustworthy)
        if z <= -0.3: return "2_below-avg"
        if z <=  0.6: return "3_fair"
        return "4_rich"
    out["val"] = out.apply(val_state, axis=1)
    top = top.merge(out[["ticker","val"]], on="ticker", how="left")
    print(f"\n=== TOP 30 INVESTABLE (rating<=3, liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — ranked by rating x STABILITY-adj quality ===")
    show = top[["ticker","route","rating","qual_adj","moat","ROE_Trailing","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","val"]].copy()
    print(show.to_string())

    # ---- BUY-NOW: quality (rating<=3) x cheap-vs-own-history (pb_z<=-0.3) x BOOK TRUSTWORTHY x liquid ----
    cheap = out[(out["rating"]<=3) & (out["liq_bn"]>=LIQ_MIN) & (out["pb_z"]<=-0.3)].copy()
    trap = cheap[cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0]                       # capital-destroyers -> pb_z is an artifact
    buy  = cheap[~(cheap["ROE_Min5Y"]<0)].copy()             # book trustworthy (no 5Y capital destruction)
    buy = buy.sort_values(["rating","pb_z"]).reset_index(drop=True); buy.index = buy.index+1
    buy.to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rating_8l_buynow.csv"))
    print(f"\n=== BUY-NOW (rating<=3 + pb_z<=-0.3 + ROE_Min5Y>=0 book-trustworthy + liq>={LIQ_MIN}bn) — {len(buy)} names ===")
    if len(buy):
        print(buy[["ticker","route","rating","moat","stab","PB","pb_z","drop_pct","ROE_Trailing","ROE_Min5Y","liq_bn","val"]].to_string())
    else:
        print("none — quality names not dislocated right now (market rich). Wait for the pitch.")
    if len(trap):
        print(f"\n  [EXCLUDED as PB_z-traps — capital-destroyers (ROE_Min5Y<0), distorted book/PB]: "
              + ", ".join(f"{t.ticker}(z{t.pb_z:.1f},ROEmin5 {t.ROE_Min5Y:.0%})" for t in trap.itertuples()))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

lastPrompt: cải thiện chính rating 8L để bắt chất lượng-dòng-tiền/lãi-một-lần (mẫu hình forensic HAG: NP>GP, CFO/NP conversion thấp, AR/revenue cao) → HAG sẽ tự về rating 4-5 → gate parking + mọi nơi dùng 8L đều…

content.text:
Now I understand the rating engine. HAG → **COMPOUNDER** route; it scores rating-2 because reported ROIC/ROE/FSCORE recovered, and the existing cash-conversion axis (`cfo_np≥0.7`) is only 1 of 6 axes (worth 2/12) — weak cash conversion costs points but doesn't gate. The user's forensic red-flags (NP>GP one-off, low CFO/NP, AR ballooning) aren't encoded.

Critically, `rating_8l.py` writes a review CSV and says *"not yet wired into the pipeline"* — the **live `fa_ratings_8l` table** is built elsewhere. Let me read the history/publisher to see where the live rating actually comes from and whether it shares this logic:

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""build_rating_8l_history.py — POINT-IN-TIME 8L quality rating (1-5) per ticker-quarter.
3	
4	The live rating_8l.py computes ONE current snapshot. For a prod-spec backtest of the
5	distress-exclusion (B) and regime-conditional sizing (C) overlays we need the rating
6	AS IT WOULD HAVE BEEN KNOWN on each historical date — i.e. point-in-time, no look-ahead.
7	
8	Approach: the rating is driven by quarterly fundamentals (ROIC/ROE/leverage/cash/FSCORE/
9	GPM-moat), all present in tav2_bq.ticker_financial. So compute the rating ONCE per
10	(ticker, quarter), stamp it with the publication date (Release_Date — when the market
11	actually had the numbers), and forward-fill to daily in the consumer via merge_asof.
12	
13	Limitations vs the live rating (documented, conservative):
14	  - BANK (ICB 8355) and POWER lenses are vnstock/current-only (no NPL/CAR history) →
15	    rated 3 (neutral) across all history. Effect: banks/power are NEVER distress-excluded
16	    nor down-weighted → the overlay's effect is measured ONLY on names where we have a
17	    genuine historical fundamental read (COMPOUNDER / CYCLICAL / REALESTATE / INSURANCE /
18	    SECURITIES). This is the correct conservative choice for an insurance-style gate.
19	  - Route classification (commodity map, holdings/RE overrides, power_set) is structural
20	    and applied across all history for the ticker.
21	
22	Output: data/rating_8l_history.pkl  columns [ticker, eff_time, quarter, route, rating]
23	Usage:  python build_rating_8l_history.py
24	"""
25	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
26	import os, sys, subprocess, tempfile
27	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
28	except Exception: pass
29	from io import StringIO
30	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
31	
32	WORKDIR = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
33	PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
34	BQ_BIN  = os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name=="nt" else "bq"))
35	
36	# ---- route sets (structural, ported from rating_8l.py) ----
37	COMMODITY_MAP = {
38	 "DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
39	 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore",
40	 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
41	 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap",
42	 "CSV":"caustic_soda"}  # CSV = chlor-alkali (NaOH+chlorine+PVC), NOT dap fertilizer — own caustic-soda cycle
43	SUGAR_SET = {"SLS","SBT","LSS","KTS","QNS"}
44	HOLDING_OVERRIDE    = {"REE"}
45	REALESTATE_OVERRIDE = {"HHS"}
46	INSURANCE_ICB  = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8530 <= c <= 8579
47	SECURITIES_ICB = lambda c: pd.notna(c) and 8770 <= c <= 8779
48	
49	
50	def bq(sql):
51	    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
52	        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
53	    try:
54	        r = subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false '
55	                           f'--project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=10000000',
56	                           capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=600, shell=True)
57	    finally:
58	        try: os.unlink(tmp)
59	        except Exception: pass
60	    if not r.stdout.strip(): raise RuntimeError("bq no rows. stderr:\n"+r.stderr[-1500:])
61	    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
62	
63	
64	# ─── ported scorecard logic (identical thresholds to rating_8l.py) ──────────────
65	def real_lev(r):
66	    v = r.get("STLTDebt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
67	    return v if pd.notna(v) else r.get("Debt_Eq_P0", np.nan)
68	
69	def moat_tag(r, roe5y):
70	    gpms = [r.get("GPM_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(8)]
71	    gpms = [g for g in gpms if pd.notna(g)]
72	    if not gpms: return "WEAK"
73	    gmean = float(np.mean(gpms))
74	    cv = (float(np.std(gpms))/gmean) if gmean > 0 else 9.0
75	    hi_level  = gmean >= 0.25
76	    stable    = (len(gpms) >= 4 and cv <= 0.20)
77	    hi_roe    = pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y >= 0.15
78	    if gmean < 0.15 or (pd.notna(roe5y) and roe5y < 0.10): return "WEAK"
79	    if hi_level and stable and hi_roe: return "STRONG"
80	    if (hi_level and (stable or hi_roe)) or (stable and hi_roe): return "MODERATE+"
81	    return "MODERATE"
82	
83	def core_score(r):
84	    ttm_cfo = sum(r.get("CF_OA_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
85	    ttm_np  = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i,    np.nan) for i in range(4))
86	    cfo_np  = (ttm_cfo/ttm_np) if (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np != 0) else np.nan
87	    roic, roicm, roe_tr, de, fs = r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan), r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan), real_lev(r), r.get("FSCORE", np.nan)
88	    s  = (2 if roic>=0.15 else 1 if roic>=0.10 else 0) if pd.notna(roic) else 0
89	    s += (2 if roicm>=0.10 else 1 if roicm>=0.05 else 0) if pd.notna(roicm) else 0
90	    s += (2 if roe_tr>=0.18 else 1 if roe_tr>=0.12 else 0) if pd.notna(roe_tr) else 0
91	    s += (2 if de<=0.3 else 1 if de<=1.0 else 0) if pd.notna(de) else 0
92	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=1.0 and ttm_cfo>0) else 1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.7) else 0)
93	    s += (2 if fs>=8 else 1 if fs>=6 else 0) if pd.notna(fs) else 0
94	    return s, (round(cfo_np,2) if pd.notna(cfo_np) else np.nan), ttm_np
95	
96	def redflag(r, ttm_np):
97	    rs = []
98	    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: rs.append("NP_TTM<0")
99	    lev = real_lev(r)
100	    if pd.notna(lev) and lev > 3: rs.append("debt/eq>3")
101	    return ",".join(rs)
102	
103	def bin_core(s):
104	    return 1 if s>=10 else 2 if s>=7 else 3 if s>=4 else 4 if s>=2 else 5
105	
106	def rate_securities(r):
107	    roe = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
108	    if pd.isna(roe): roe = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
109	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
110	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe
111	    ttm_np = sum(r.get("NP_P%d"%i, np.nan) for i in range(4))
112	    if (pd.notna(roe) and roe < 0) or (pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0): return 5
113	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.13 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.11: return 2
114	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.09 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.07: return 3
115	    if pd.notna(roe) and roe>=0.05: return 4
116	    return 5
117	
118	def rate_insurance(r):
119	    roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
120	    if pd.isna(roe_tr): roe_tr = r.get("ROE_Min3Y", np.nan)
121	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr < 0: return 5
122	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
123	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe_tr
124	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.15 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.12: return 1
125	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.11 and pd.notna(r3) and r3>=0.09: return 2
126	    if pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.07: return 3
127	    if pd.notna(roe_tr): return 4
128	    return 4
129	
130	def rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np):
131	    if pd.notna(ttm_np) and ttm_np < 0: return 5
132	    roe_tr, roic, de, fs, roicm = r.get("ROE_Trailing",np.nan), r.get("ROIC3Y",np.nan), real_lev(r), r.get("FSCORE", np.nan), r.get("ROIC_Min3Y",np.nan)
133	    unearn, assets = r.get("UnearnRev_P0",np.nan), r.get("totalAsset_P0",np.nan)
134	    pipeline = (unearn/assets) if (pd.notna(unearn) and pd.notna(assets) and assets>0) else np.nan
135	    s  = (2 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.18) else 1 if (pd.notna(roe_tr) and roe_tr>=0.10) else 0)
136	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.12) else 1 if (pd.notna(roic) and roic>=0.07) else 0)
137	    s += (2 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=0.5) else 1 if (pd.notna(de) and de<=1.5) else 0)
138	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(cfo_np) and cfo_np>=0.8) else 0)
139	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(fs) and fs>=6) else 0)
140	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(roicm) and roicm>=0) else 0)
141	    s += (1 if (pd.notna(pipeline) and pipeline>=0.15) else 0)
142	    return 2 if s>=6 else 3 if s>=4 else 4
143	
144	# BANK_POWER_MODE: "neutral" (=3, no historical lens) or "roe" (point-in-time ROE bins).
145	# The live bank/power lenses (NPL/CAR/debt-lifecycle) are vnstock current-only -> can't be
146	# back-tested point-in-time. "roe" approximates them honestly from ROE history (in ticker_financial):
147	# it scores the FRANCHISE-strength axis (the base of the live bank lens) without the asset-quality
148	# upgrade to 1-2 (which needs NPL/coverage we don't have historically). Conservative & no look-ahead.
149	BANK_POWER_MODE = os.environ.get("BANK_POWER_MODE", "neutral")
150	
151	def rate_fin_roe(r):
152	    """ROE-based bins for bank/power (point-in-time, from ROE_Trailing/ROE3Y history).
153	    Mirrors the live bank lens's ROE base (no NPL/CAR upgrade): <8% impaired franchise."""
154	    roe = r.get("ROE_Trailing", np.nan)
155	    if pd.isna(roe): roe = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
156	    r3 = r.get("ROE3Y", np.nan)
157	    if pd.isna(r3): r3 = roe
158	    if pd.isna(roe): return 3                       # no data -> neutral
159	    if roe < 0.08: return 5                          # weak franchise
160	    if roe >= 0.15 and pd.notna(r3) and r3 >= 0.12: return 2   # cap 2 w/o asset-quality lens
161	    if roe >= 0.12: return 3
162	    return 4
163	
164	def rate_row(r):
165	    route = r["route"]
166	    s, cfo_np, ttm_np = core_score(r)
167	    moat = moat_tag(r, r.get("ROE5Y", np.nan))
168	    rf = redflag(r, ttm_np)
169	    if route == "SECURITIES":   return rate_securities(r)
170	    if route == "INSURANCE":    return rate_insurance(r)
171	    if route == "REALESTATE":   return rate_realestate(r, cfo_np, ttm_np)
172	    if route == "BANK":         return rate_fin_roe(r) if BANK_POWER_MODE=="roe" else 3
173	    if route == "POWER":        return rate_fin_roe(r) if BANK_POWER_MODE=="roe" else 3
174	    if route == "CYCLICAL":
175	        if rf: return 5
176	        if pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r) > 1.5: return 5
177	        prelim = bin_core(s)
178	        fortress = (pd.notna(real_lev(r)) and real_lev(r)<=0.2 and pd.notna(r.get("ROIC3Y")) and r["ROIC3Y"]>=0.20)
179	        return prelim if prelim>=2 else (1 if fortress else 2)
180	    # COMPOUNDER
181	    if rf: return 5
182	    prelim = bin_core(s)
183	    rating = prelim
184	    if moat=="STRONG" and prelim in (2,3): rating = prelim-1
185	    if rating == 5: rating = 4       # profitable-but-thin -> speculative(4), not impaired(5)
186	    return rating
187	
188	
189	def main():
190	    print("[1] Pulling ticker_financial quarterly history + ICB...")
191	    fin = bq("""
192	    SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.Release_Date, f.quarter,
193	      f.ROE5Y, f.ROIC3Y, f.ROIC_Min3Y, f.ROE_Trailing, f.ROE3Y, f.ROE_Min3Y,
194	      f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.Debt_Eq_P0, f.FSCORE,
195	      f.GPM_P0,f.GPM_P1,f.GPM_P2,f.GPM_P3,f.GPM_P4,f.GPM_P5,f.GPM_P6,f.GPM_P7,
196	      f.CF_OA_P0,f.CF_OA_P1,f.CF_OA_P2,f.CF_OA_P3,
197	      f.NP_P0,f.NP_P1,f.NP_P2,f.NP_P3,
198	      f.UnearnRev_P0, f.totalAsset_P0
199	    FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
200	    WHERE f.time >= DATE '2012-01-01'
201	    """)
202	    icb = bq("""SELECT t.ticker, APPROX_TOP_COUNT(t.ICB_Code, 1)[OFFSET(0)].value AS ICB_Code
203	                FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker""")
204	    fin = fin.merge(icb, on="ticker", how="left")
205	    print(f"  financial rows: {len(fin):,}  tickers: {fin['ticker'].nunique()}")
